rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF REGINA POTASCHER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: continued to august 20, 2019. no response filed (not just uploaded) 3 court days before the hearing; no POS of NOH on file, no proposed order delivered to the examiner. new deadline in order to avoid an automatic continuance is tuesday, august 13, 2019. In addition, the examiner notes the petition states the declaration re extraordinary fees will be timely noticed before the hearing (15 days), so proper notice of that declaration must be mailed, with a proper POS filed by the deadline.
